plugin_desc: Spectracom SecureSync and NetClock time-server SNMP collection for appliances under Spectracom PEN 18837. The shared SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. This child template adds confirmed xSync and NTP status scalars for synchronization, DC power, alarm state, NTP mode and stratum. Temperature and hot-swap objects are not collected in this pass because their numeric leaf OIDs were not fully verified.
name: NetworkService

metrics.name: network_service_spectracom_sync_state
metrics.description: Spectracom xSync system synchronization state from OID 18837.3.2.2.1.5, normalized so sync is 1 and nosync or unknown values are 2.

metrics.name: network_service_spectracom_dc_power_state
metrics.description: Spectracom DC power input status from OID 18837.3.2.2.1.2, normalized so ok is 1 and alarm, none or unknown values are 2.

metrics.name: network_service_spectracom_minor_alarm_state
metrics.description: Spectracom minor alarm state from OID 18837.3.2.2.1.13, normalized so clear is 1 and pending or unknown values are 2.

metrics.name: network_service_spectracom_major_alarm_state
metrics.description: Spectracom major alarm state from OID 18837.3.2.2.1.14, normalized so clear is 1 and pending or unknown values are 2.

metrics.name: network_service_spectracom_ntp_state
metrics.description: Spectracom NTP current mode from OID 18837.3.3.2.1, normalized so synchronized is 1 and unknown, notRunning or notSynchronized values are 2.

metrics.name: network_service_spectracom_ntp_stratum
metrics.description: Spectracom NTP current stratum from OID 18837.3.3.2.2.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCInOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCOutOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
